case_title: MICHAEL J ASSAD et al VS. VERIZON WIRELESS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL J. ASSAD. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-10-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ASSAD, MICHAEL J WILLIAMS, TIMOTHY K AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSAD, MICHAEL J WILLIAMS, TIMOTHY K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS $1,107.85 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,137.85, IN LIEU OF FULL PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2011, WAIVE THE SERVICE CANCELLATION FEE OF $500.00, THEREBY REDUCING THE JUDGMENT TO $607.85. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
